title: Verify user can mark a todo as complete

steps.action: Navigate to the TodoMVC application with at least one todo in the list
steps.expected: The todo list displays the existing todo with an unchecked toggle

steps.action: Click the toggle checkbox next to the todo
steps.expected: The todo is marked as complete and visually styled as completed

steps.action: Verify the items-left count decreases by one
steps.expected: The footer shows one fewer item left

preconditions.action: Enter a sample todo in the new-todo input field

preconditions.expected: The todo appears in the list, rendering the toggle controls
